Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm, Friday 10am-5pm (541) 444-1030 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS THREE RIVERS DENTAL CLINIC COOS BAY DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides pediatric and general dental services, including cleanings, fillings, crowns, bridges, dentures, root canals, treatment planning, and extractions. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Enrolled members of federally recognized Indian Tribes Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm (541) 888-6433 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a full-time pediatric dentist, with access to local specialists for emergency referrals. Capable of managing comprehensive patient care in the clinic and coordinating referrals for specialized treatment. Operates a mobile medical and dental bus twice a month at various locations on the Warm Springs Reservation. Offers a range of pediatric specialty programs, including the Silver Nitrate Project for children ages 0–6 with active tooth decay. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-7pm, Wednesday 1pm-7pm, Friday 8am-5pm.
